CustomObject.description: Org-wide settings for the custom mass-email send + tracking system. Hierarchy type allows org-default value with optional per-user/profile overrides if needed in future. Values read by ULBC_EmailSendService, ULBC_EmailHtmlMutator, ULBC_EmailSendQueueable, and ULBC_EmailTrackingResource.
CustomObject.label: ULBC Email Settings
